title: Tap – Digital Business Card
description: Tap is advancing your networking game by allowing you to share it all — your social media, contact info, files, and so much more. Tap uses NFC technology integrated into cards, stickers, and keychains. This contactless technology can up your networking and leave everyone you meet stunned with the ease of sharing everything with just a tap. Our dedicated mobile app allows you to customize what you share with complete ease and immediate info updates.
responsibilities: Designed and delivered complete digital business card ecosystem
Implemented NFC-sharing and QR-code identity exchange
Built offline-first architecture with smart data caching
hardestFeatures: NFC integration and QR code generation

title: Pepwell – Employee Wellness SuperApp
description: PepWell is your gateway to Offers & Discounts, designed to bring you the best deals right at your fingertips. With an intuitive interface and a wide selection of exclusive offers, the app makes it easier than ever to save on everything from everyday essentials to luxury experiences. Enjoy personalized recommendations, instant notifications for limited-time promotions, and a seamless offers experience that puts the power of savings in your hands.
responsibilities: Implemented home experience and search modules
hardestFeatures: Complex state management for wellness tracking

title: Al Auf – B2B Employee Transportation
description: A B2B employee transportation platform connecting factories and enterprises with fleet management for daily employee commutes. Features real-time GPS tracking, route optimization, and shift-based scheduling.
responsibilities: Led mobile team as Senior Flutter Developer
Built B2B fleet management for employee transportation across factories
Created shift-based scheduling and multi-stop route optimization
hardestFeatures: Multi-stop route optimization for factory shift schedules

title: Real Deal – Vendor & Client Apps / Car Marketplace
description: Real Deal connects users with trusted vendor dealers, making it easy to discover, browse, and access real products and services in one place. The simplest way for any user to connect with verified automotive vendors and find their perfect new or used vehicle. Browse an extensive, high-quality inventory straight from professional dealers, with detailed listings, direct inquiry, and seamless search filters.

title: Deliverzy – Delivery App
description: Deliverzy is a food delivery application in Egypt, featuring a curated selection of restaurants, shops, supermarkets, gifts, and pharmacies near you with dedicated delivery to any location within your city. Order deliveries from the best restaurants, supermarket items, urgent medicine from pharmacies, and more. Track your delivery driver moment by moment on the map, and pay with cash or visa.
responsibilities: Implemented real-time tracking via maps and WebSockets

title: Nology Store – E-commerce Platform
description: Nology Store is Qatar's favorite online shop specializing in selling the latest high-quality electronics and accessories at competitive prices. Buy home and smart products, mobile devices, e-cards, accessories, computers, headphones, routers, and more. Features instant e-card delivery by email, same-day delivery, free shipping on orders over 500 QR, and return/money-back guarantee.

title: Sela SuperApp
description: The Sela Super App is an all-in-one platform exclusively for Sela Company employees. Connect with colleagues through a social media hub, access internal courses to boost your skills, stay updated with company news and reports, and earn badges for achievements. With secure, admin-approved access, the app ensures a focused and safe environment for the team.

title: El Khetta – Student & Teacher Tutoring Platform
description: El Khetta is an interactive tutoring platform that bridges students and teachers through a rich, visually engaging learning experience. Students can browse and enroll with different teachers, access structured lesson plans, and watch high-quality video content for each lesson — all wrapped in a catchy, modern UI that makes learning feel intuitive and enjoyable. With organized course structures, subscription plans, and progress tracking, El Khetta transforms online education into a seamless journey from enrollment to mastery.
responsibilities: Developed visually rich lesson integration with engaging UI/UX
Implemented video playback system for lesson content delivery
Created structured lesson plans and course navigation
Built teacher browsing and enrollment workflows
Established comprehensive design system and reusable component library
Optimized performance for smooth video streaming and content loading
hardestFeatures: Visually engaging lesson UI with rich media integration
Scalable design system across diverse course content
Performance at high user volume (100K+ users)

title: Padle Rush
description: Mobile application with 10K+ downloads, focusing on reusable design systems and engaging user experience.

title: Emart
description: E-commerce application with secure login, payment integrations, chat functionality, and caching systems.

title: Benefx
description: BenefEx is the first Egyptian smartphone application that enables corporate employees and individuals to enjoy special offers, promotions, and discounts through a wide network of service providers and merchants. All users enjoy the benefit of saving money, creating an exceptional experience for people, companies, and merchants.

title: IRC – Insurance Services Platform
description: IRC is a comprehensive insurance platform that empowers individuals and businesses to explore, compare, and apply for a wide range of insurance policies — including medical, home, and auto coverage — all from one place. With a streamlined application process, secure online payment, and dedicated contact support for large-quota corporate plans, IRC simplifies every step from policy selection to purchase. Whether you're an individual seeking personal coverage or a company managing employee benefits, IRC delivers a seamless, paperless insurance experience.
responsibilities: Built end-to-end insurance application flows for medical, home, and auto policies
Implemented multi-plan comparison and policy selection for individuals and corporate clients
Integrated secure online payment gateway for premium transactions
Developed dedicated contact support module for large-quota corporate inquiries
Created dynamic form system for diverse insurance application requirements
Built user dashboards for policy management and renewal tracking
hardestFeatures: Dynamic form generation for varied policy types
Corporate vs individual user flow management
